Master Your Finances with AuraSpend

A beautiful, privacy-first expense manager for Android. Smart bank message classification, budget tracking, Google Drive backup — all wrapped in a stunning Material 3 AMOLED interface.

Download APK View on GitHub Learn More
100%
Open Source
Android 16
Latest SDK
Apache 2.0
License

Everything You Need to Manage Your Money

AuraSpend combines powerful expense tracking with a gorgeous, battery-friendly interface.

Auto-Classification

Forward bank SMS messages and AuraSpend automatically extracts & categorizes transactions. No manual entry required.

Budget Tracking

Set monthly budgets per category and track progress in real-time. Get notified when you're approaching limits.

Recurring Subscriptions

Track all your subscriptions in one place. Never miss a renewal or forget to cancel an unused service.

Google Drive Backup

Secure backups to your Google Drive in an app-specific folder. Your data stays yours, accessible only by you.

CSV Import / Export

Import transactions from your bank or export your data for analysis in spreadsheets. Full data portability.

Insights & Analytics

Beautiful charts and spending breakdowns help you understand your habits and make smarter financial decisions.

Pure AMOLED Theme

True black pixels save battery on OLED screens. A stunning dark interface that's easy on the eyes, day or night.

Material 3 Design

Built from the ground up with Material Design 3, dynamic colors, spring animations, and edge-to-edge immersive UI.

100% Open Source

Freely available under Apache 2.0. Build it yourself, audit the code, or contribute. No vendor lock-in, no hidden tracking.

Why AuraSpend?

Thousands of expense trackers exist. Here is why AuraSpend is different.

1

Privacy First, Always

Your financial data never touches our servers. Everything stays on your device and your Google Drive — under your control. No accounts to create, no data to mine.

2

Smart & Automated

Bank SMS auto-classification means you spend seconds, not minutes, tracking expenses. The app learns your patterns and categorizes transactions intelligently.

3

Beautiful by Design

Every pixel is crafted with care. Dynamic Material 3 theming, spring animations, AMOLED optimization, and an intuitive navigation pattern make expense management actually enjoyable.

4

Truly Open Source

Apache 2.0 licensed. No proprietary SDKs, no telemetry, no ad libraries in the core. Build the free flavor yourself with all premium features unlocked, or support development via the Play Store.

Open Source. Open Future.

AuraSpend is built in the open and will always remain free.

Apache License 2.0

AuraSpend is 100% open source software licensed under Apache 2.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the application. The free build flavor includes all premium features at no cost. The Play Store version uses Google Play Billing to support ongoing development — but you never have to use it.

Source Code View License Contributing Guide

Ready to Take Control of Your Finances?

Download AuraSpend free today and experience expense management the way it should be.

Download AuraSpend

A beautiful, open-source expense manager for Android. Built with Material 3, backed by privacy, powered by the community.
